languages.text: "Ложь!" {n}Манипулус отзывается с неожиданной горячностью.{/n} "Если разум ксеноса столь ограничен, что он {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}не может вести диалог{/d} с таким видным мыслителем, как Нунциус, это совершенно точно не вина Нунциуса".

"Lies!" {n}The Manipulus responds with unexpected vehemence.{/n} "If the xenos mind is so limited that it {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}cannot hold a dialogue{/d} with such a distinguished thinker as Nuncius, then the blame rests with the xenos alone."
languages.original_text: "Ложь!" {n}Манипулус отзывается с неожиданной горячностью.{/n} "Если разум ксеноса столь ограничен, что он {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}не может вести диалог{/d} с таким видным мыслителем, как Нунциус, это совершенно точно не вина Нунциуса".

"Lies!" {n}The Manipulus responds with unexpected vehemence.{/n} "If the xenos mind is so limited that it {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}cannot hold a dialogue{/d} with such a distinguished thinker as Nuncius, then the blame rests with the xenos alone."

languages.text: "Lügen!" {n}Der Manipulus antwortet mit einer unerwarteten Vehemenz.{/n} "Wenn der Verstand des Xenos so beschränkt ist, dass er sich mit einem so erlesenen Denker wie Nuncius {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}nicht austauschen kann{/d}, trifft allein den Xenos die Schuld."
languages.original_text: "Lies!" {n}The Manipulus responds with unexpected vehemence.{/n} "If the xenos mind is so limited that it {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}cannot hold a dialogue{/d} with such a distinguished thinker as Nuncius, then the blame rests with the xenos alone."

traits.locale_text: "Lügen!" {n}Der Manipulus antwortet mit einer unerwarteten Vehemenz.{/n} "Wenn der Verstand des Xenos so beschränkt ist, dass er sich mit einem so erlesenen Denker wie Nuncius {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}nicht austauschen kann{/d}, trifft allein den Xenos die Schuld."

languages.text: « Mensonges ! {n}s'exclame le manipulus avec une véhémence surprenante.{/n} L'esprit de ce xénos est si limité qu'il est {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}incapable d'échanger{/d} avec un penseur aussi raffiné que Nuncius. Le problème repose uniquement sur le xénos. »
languages.original_text: "Lies!" {n}The Manipulus responds with unexpected vehemence.{/n} "If the xenos mind is so limited that it {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}cannot hold a dialogue{/d} with such a distinguished thinker as Nuncius, then the blame rests with the xenos alone."

traits.locale_text: « Mensonges ! {n}s'exclame le manipulus avec une véhémence surprenante.{/n} L'esprit de ce xénos est si limité qu'il est {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}incapable d'échanger{/d} avec un penseur aussi raffiné que Nuncius. Le problème repose uniquement sur le xénos. »

languages.text: «¡Miente!» {n}El manipulus responde con sorprendente vehemencia.{/n} «Si la mente del xenos es tan limitada como para ser {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}incapaz de dialogar{/d} con un pensador de la talla de Nuncius, la culpa recae solo sobre el xenos».
languages.original_text: "Lies!" {n}The Manipulus responds with unexpected vehemence.{/n} "If the xenos mind is so limited that it {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}cannot hold a dialogue{/d} with such a distinguished thinker as Nuncius, then the blame rests with the xenos alone."

traits.locale_text: «¡Miente!» {n}El manipulus responde con sorprendente vehemencia.{/n} «Si la mente del xenos es tan limitada como para ser {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}incapaz de dialogar{/d} con un pensador de la talla de Nuncius, la culpa recae solo sobre el xenos».

languages.text: "Yalan!" {n}Manipülus, beklenmedik bir şiddetle karşılık veriyor.{/n} "Zeno zihni, Nuncius gibi seçkin bir düşünürle {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}diyalog kuramayacak{/d} kadar sınırlıysa o zaman suç zenonundur."
languages.original_text: "Lies!" {n}The Manipulus responds with unexpected vehemence.{/n} "If the xenos mind is so limited that it {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}cannot hold a dialogue{/d} with such a distinguished thinker as Nuncius, then the blame rests with the xenos alone."

traits.locale_text: "Yalan!" {n}Manipülus, beklenmedik bir şiddetle karşılık veriyor.{/n} "Zeno zihni, Nuncius gibi seçkin bir düşünürle {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}diyalog kuramayacak{/d} kadar sınırlıysa o zaman suç zenonundur."

languages.text: “他说谎！”{n}操纵者的回应出乎意料地激烈。{/n}“如果异形的心智狭隘到{d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}无法与努恩修斯这样杰出的智慧进行交流{/d}，那问题只可能出在异形自己身上。”
languages.original_text: "Lies!" {n}The Manipulus responds with unexpected vehemence.{/n} "If the xenos mind is so limited that it {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}cannot hold a dialogue{/d} with such a distinguished thinker as Nuncius, then the blame rests with the xenos alone."

traits.locale_text: “他说谎！”{n}操纵者的回应出乎意料地激烈。{/n}“如果异形的心智狭隘到{d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}无法与努恩修斯这样杰出的智慧进行交流{/d}，那问题只可能出在异形自己身上。”

languages.text: 「嘘だ！」{n}マニピュルスは、思いがけぬ激しさで応じる。{/n}「異種族の精神があまりに限られているせいで、ヌンキウスほど卓越した思索家と{d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}対話を交わすことすらできない{/d}というのなら、その責めはひとえに異種族の側にある」
languages.original_text: "Lies!" {n}The Manipulus responds with unexpected vehemence.{/n} "If the xenos mind is so limited that it {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}cannot hold a dialogue{/d} with such a distinguished thinker as Nuncius, then the blame rests with the xenos alone."

traits.locale_text: 「嘘だ！」{n}マニピュルスは、思いがけぬ激しさで応じる。{/n}「異種族の精神があまりに限られているせいで、ヌンキウスほど卓越した思索家と{d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}対話を交わすことすらできない{/d}というのなら、その責めはひとえに異種族の側にある」
